---

layout: default.njk

title: FIREandLife - Financial Clarity for Life

description: Tools and resources to help you achieve Financial Independence without sacrificing the life you love.

---


<section class="hero" style="background:#f2f2f2; color:#333; text-align:center; padding:3rem 1rem;">

  <h1>Financial Independence Made Simple</h1>

  <p>Plan smarter. Live better. Tools and resources for your FI journey—without sacrificing what matters most.</p>

  <a href="/calculators/index.html" class="btn-primary">Explore Calculators</a>

</section>


<section class="section">

  <h2>Why FIREandLife?</h2>

  <p style="text-align:center; max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">

    Life still happens on the path to FI. Denying yourself joy for years is not sustainable—and if you don’t know how to live fully now, you won’t know how to live once you reach FI.

    Our tools and resources help you balance your pursuit of Financial Independence with living a fulfilling life today.

  </p>

</section>


<section class="section">

  <h2>Featured Calculators</h2>

  <div class="grid">

    <div class="card">
